raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding a denied credit card dispute for merchandise not received. 

I purchased merchandise in the amount of {$1200.00} from XXXX XXXX XXXX. The item was never delivered. XXXX conducted an investigation and confirmed the package was lost. 

XXXX approved the claim ; however, reimbursement was limited to {$110.00} because the merchant failed to declare or insure the shipment for its full value. 

The merchant has refused to issue a refund despite confirmation that the merchandise was never delivered. 

I disputed the charge with my credit card issuer. The dispute was closed before the carrier investigation concluded. After the loss was confirmed and the merchant refused to refund, I requested reconsideration. The credit card issuer denied the dispute and instructed me to resolve the matter with the merchant. 

I believe my card issuer failed to properly apply consumer protections for merchandise not received, despite documented carrier confirmation of loss and merchant non-fulfillment.

I am requesting that the credit card issuer review this matter under merchandise not received and provide appropriate relief.
